summary:
Step 6 'Expected the footer 'Home' link to be visible indicating the page loaded without an error message.' failed. Error: TEST FAILURE

The floating chat launcher is missing from the Demo page; the feature cannot be tested.

Observations:
- The Demo page loaded normally and displayed hero and demo content (no blank screen or error).
- No floating circular launcher button was visible in the bottom-right corner of the page; the page's interactive elements list contains no launcher/button entries.
- A search for 'chat' returned 34 text matches on the page, but no clickable launcher control or button element was present to open a chat panel.
